reverse-engineer.description: Reverse engineer Shopify site with Playwright + Central Brain + MCP

central-brain.description: PostgreSQL memory + Hermes3 reasoning for migration orchestration

deploy.description: VPS deployment, Docker lifecycle, SSL, rollback management

data-sync.description: Shopify → DaVinciOS CMS data synchronization via MCP + Central Brain

image-pipeline.description: Image migration from Shopify CDN to self-hosted storage

navigation.description: Shopify mega menu → Next.js navigation migration

theme-migration.description: Shopify Liquid theme → Next.js component migration with visual verification

security.description: Security audit: secrets, headers, SSL, exposed ports, deps

planner.description: Analyze migration state and prioritize next tasks

shopify-auditor.description: Cross-reference Shopify data from scanner vs MCP vs export

seo.description: SEO metadata validation and improvement suggestions

frontend-builder.description: Build Next.js frontend components matching Shopify design

qa.description: Quality assurance: broken links, screenshots, Lighthouse, forms

content.description: Draft and improve product descriptions, landing pages, blog posts

deployer.description: 🚀 Central deploy coordinator: locks, queues, and executes deploys across multiple coding extensions. Prevents duplicate runs. Uses Tailscale SSH + VPS MCP fallback.

concierge-builder.description: Build and maintain the HomeU Concierge chatbot: widget UI, API endpoints, AI integration, lead capture, RFQ cart sync, Telegram alerts, appointment booking

website-designer.description: Design premium UI for HomeU: login pages, admin backend, customer frontend, design system, and UX improvements

shopify-reverse-engineer.description: Full migration pipeline: Playwright scan, MCP, Ollama vision, Central Brain

migration-central-brain.description: PostgreSQL memory store + Hermes3 reasoning for intelligent migration

deploy.description: VPS Docker deployment, SSL, rollback management

data-sync.description: Synchronize Shopify data to DaVinciOS CMS through Central Brain

image-pipeline.description: Image migration from Shopify CDN to self-hosted storage

navigation-migration.description: Migrate Shopify mega menu navigation to Next.js

theme-migration.description: Convert Shopify Liquid to Next.js components with visual verification

security-audit.description: Security scanning: secrets, headers, SSL, ports, dependencies

frontend.description: Build and maintain the HomeU customer-facing frontend: pages, components, RFQ cart, data fetching patterns

nextjs.description: Next.js 16 + DaVinciOS CMS 3 resources: architecture, API endpoints, data patterns, env config, scanned data references

shopify.description: Shopify e-commerce operations: customers, orders, products sync, inventory tracking, API resources

crm.description: Customer relationship management: customer profiles, RFQ lifecycle, quotation tracking, sales pipeline

concierge-chatbot.description: AI-powered RFQ sales assistant chatbot: lead capture, product recommendations, RFQ cart, appointment booking, Telegram alerts, Viber handoff, lead scoring

website-designer.description: UI/UX design system for HomeU: login pages, admin backend, customer frontend, design system, and accessibility improvements

instagram-api.description: Instagram Graph API sync: token management, webhook support, cron-based media sync to instagram_posts table. Posts land in status=pending for admin moderation.

instagram-gallery.description: Instagram feed frontend gallery: 7 layout algorithms (masonry, metro, classic, collage, carousel, spotlight, polaroid), shoppable hotspots, hover overlays, skeleton loading. Based on Pasilobus/nocodeapi patterns.

instagram-admin.description: Instagram admin moderation: pin/hide/approve/reject, product tagging, collection tagging, manual upload, grid management, publish/unpublish, display location control.

instagram-rfq.description: Instagram-to-RFQ integration: shoppable tags → RFQ cart → quotation request pipeline. Track Instagram post RFQ conversions and quote rates per post.

app-builder.description: App Builder Agent core skill: process, architecture rules, app priority list, 15 planned apps with build status

app-builder-calculator.description: Calculator Apps: paint, tile, lighting, furniture layout, flooring, wallpaper, blinds, budget — conversion-first UX, product CTAs after results

app-builder-rfq-cart.description: RFQ Cart App: slide-out cart, product collection, submit quotation request, admin RFQ management with status workflow

docker-auto-start.description: Auto-detect and start Docker Desktop when PostgreSQL/Redis is unreachable. Checks ports, starts daemon, waits for healthy containers, restarts dev server.

nightly-qa.description: Autonomous QA worker running 2am-6am daily. Tests every admin page, API route, theme section, and workflow. Finds bugs, gaps, and researches feature recommendations. Uses Hermes Claw + OpenClaw + web-crawler.

migrate.description: Run the full migration pipeline: scan → sync → build → verify
migrate.prompt: Execute the migration workflow: 1) Run reverse-engineer to scan Shopify, 2) Sync data via data-sync, 3) Build frontend via frontend-builder, 4) Run QA checks, 5) Report status

security-scan.prompt: Load security-audit skill. Execute all audit commands and generate docs/SECURITY_AUDIT.md report.

sync-data.description: Export all Shopify data via MCP and store in Central Brain
sync-data.prompt: Load data-sync skill. Run shopify-mcp server export, store in Central Brain, validate counts.

scan.description: Run Playwright scanner on www.homeu.ph with screenshots
scan.prompt: Run the Playwright scanner with screenshots enabled. Store results in Central Brain.

visual-check.description: Compare old Shopify vs new frontend screenshots via Ollama vision
visual-check.prompt: Run ollama-vision.mjs to compare screenshots between www.homeu.ph and store.homeu.ph.

plan.description: Show migration status and Hermes3-recommended next steps
plan.prompt: Read Central Brain status and docs/STATUS.md. Use Hermes3 to suggest optimal next task.

deploy.description: 🚀 Queue a full deploy through the Deployer Agent. Locks, deduplicates, coordinates across extensions.
deploy.prompt: Use the Deployer Agent to perform a full deploy: 1) Check deployer_status for locks, 2) Call deployer_deploy, 3) Monitor queue, 4) Report result with health check.

build.description: 🏗️ Queue a Docker build via the Deployer Agent. Separate build container, no production impact.
build.prompt: Use the Deployer Agent build tool. Check for existing build lock, then queue a build. Use the separate build.Dockerfile for isolation.

build-chatbot.description: 🤖 Build the HomeU Concierge chatbot: load skill guide and build all components
build-chatbot.prompt: Load the concierge-chatbot skill. Run the concierge-builder agent to build the full chatbot system: 1) Database schema, 2) AI provider layer, 3) Chat API endpoints, 4) Chat widget UI components, 5) Layout integration, 6) Telegram notifications.

build-docker.description: 🐳 Run a Docker build (builder stage) with PostgreSQL locking. All agents use this same command.
build-docker.prompt: Run the build agent to verify the Docker build compiles: node tools/build-agent/build-agent.mjs. This triggers a builder-stage build with PostgreSQL locking shared across all coding extensions. Results are logged to memory/task-log.jsonl. Check the output JSON for success/failure and duration.

build-docker-full.description: 🐳 Run a full Docker production image build with PostgreSQL locking.
build-docker-full.prompt: Run the build agent for a full production Docker build: node tools/build-agent/build-agent.mjs --full. This triggers a production image build with PostgreSQL locking shared across all coding extensions. Results are logged to memory/task-log.jsonl.

design.description: 🎨 Invoke the Website Designer Agent for UI/UX improvements: login redesign, admin backend redesign, frontend design system updates, or accessibility fixes.
design.prompt: Load the website-designer skill. Invoke the website-designer agent to handle the design task. First read the design resources in design-resources/davincios-design-skills/ for checklists and references. Apply the design philosophy: luxury furniture aesthetic, warm neutrals, generous whitespace, shadcn/ui foundation. Preserve SEO and never auto-publish changes without human review.

build-app.description: 🧩 Build a new Category App for DaVinciOS: scaffold data model, API routes, admin UI, frontend widget, and QA checklist. Usage: /build-app <app-name>
build-app.prompt: Load the app-builder skill and its sub-skills (app-builder-calculator, app-builder-rfq-cart, etc.). Read agents/app-builder/agent.md for the build workflow. Read agents/app-builder/build-workflow.md for the phased process. Read templates/app-builder/app-spec-template.md for the output format. Then ask the user which app to build and follow the build-new-app workflow.

lessons-backfill.description: 📚 Backfill lessons from git history into the learning layer
lessons-backfill.prompt: Run the lesson backfill script: node tools/backfill-lessons.mjs. This extracts lessons from all feat/fix/perf/refactor commits since the last backfill and appends them to memory/lessons-learned.md and memory/lesson-index.jsonl.

lessons-retrieve.description: 🔍 Retrieve relevant lessons before coding. Usage: /lessons-retrieve <query>
lessons-retrieve.prompt: Run the lesson retrieval tool: node tools/lesson-retrieve.mjs query "{{input}}" --limit 5. This finds relevant lessons from prior tasks that match the current coding context.

lessons-summary.description: 📊 Show learning layer statistics and health
lessons-summary.prompt: Run the lesson summary: node tools/lesson-retrieve.mjs summary. This shows total lessons, breakdown by type, and top tags.

nightly-qa.description: 🌙 Run the Nightly QA agent — tests all admin pages, API routes, theme sections. Finds bugs, gaps, and researches improvements.
nightly-qa.prompt: Load the nightly-qa skill. Run the nightly QA worker: node tools/nightly-qa/run-nightly-qa.mjs. This tests all admin pages, API routes, and theme sections. Records bugs to memory/bug-log.jsonl, gaps to memory/gap-log.jsonl, and feature recommendations to memory/feature-recommendations.jsonl. Generates a report at memory/nightly-reports/YYYY-MM-DD.md.

nightly-qa-quick.description: ⚡ Quick nightly QA — theme sections + wiring only (15 min)
nightly-qa-quick.prompt: Load the nightly-qa skill. Run the quick QA check: node tools/nightly-qa/run-nightly-qa.mjs --quick. This audits all 22 theme sections and wiring/integration. Records bugs and gaps to the JSONL log files.
